name: pygameplayer
documentation:
# pygameplayer 

## This is a simple pygame audio player 
## Examples :
``` bash 
pip install pygameplayer
```
``` python
    from pygameplayer import play
    play(audio_path)
```

functions.name: pygameplayer.main.play
documentation:
Play an audio file using pygame with a simple function call.
\:param audio_file: Path to the audio file (e.g., .mp3, .wav).
